title: Create Aeronautics: Tournament
description: the real tournament is about to begin...
body:
Updated to support Sable 1.0.6+, added six-way thruster and six-way spinner and so on, and fixed numerous bugs, real instantaneous explosives that can trigger each other, no more altitude and speed limits, the real tournament is about to begin...

The six-way state machine RCS system greatly simplifies the manufacturing of a wide range of vehicles, including rockets, airplanes, helicopters, and even cars and motorcycles. Furthermore, its internal parameters can be modified using an NBT editor for a more powerful and customizable experience. Configurable force and torque means that force and torque of any magnitude and direction can be generated at the block's position.

The Gyro, Acts as a horizontal attitude controller with automatic stabilization, greatly simplifying the construction of helicopters and drones. The gyro continuously corrects the vehicle’s pitch and roll to maintain a level attitude. Its top redstone interface accepts signal strength, which directly controls the stabilization intensity: higher signal strength results in weaker correction force, while lower strength allows softer, more natural response.
